title: Dasystephana affinis
taxonomy: Dasystephana affinis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Mexico and belongs to the genus Dasystephana. The classification of Dasystephana affinis places it within the kingdom Plantae, and phylum Magnoliophyta. Its classification also includes the class Magnoliopsida and order Asterales. The plant is a member of the family Asteraceae and the genus Dasystephana.
